zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Scot於1525年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安波寧頓時，他的父親John Scott21歲，母親Isobelle Douglas16歲。他於1550年與Helen Tweedie在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾皮布萊斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1609年在英國蘇格蘭享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Scot于1525年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安波寧頓时，他的父亲John Scott21岁，母亲Isobelle Douglas16岁。他于1550年与Helen Tweedie在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾皮布萊斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1609年在英国苏格兰享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Scot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Scott
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Scot was born in 1525, in Bonnington, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, John Scott, was 21 and his mother, Isobelle Douglas, was 16. He married Helen Tweedie in 1550, in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1609, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Scot est né en 1525, à Bonnington, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, John Scott, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isobelle Douglas, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Helen Tweedie en 1550, à Peebles, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1609, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Scot 1525 in Bonnington, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Scott 21 und seine Mutter Isobelle Douglas 16. Er hat 1550 in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Helen Tweedie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1609 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Scot è nato il nel 1525 nel Bonnington, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, John Scott, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Isobelle Douglas, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Helen Tweedie nel 1550, nel Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1609, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Scotが1525年にスコットランドミドロスアンボニントンで生まれた時，父John Scottは21歳，母Isobelle Douglasは16歳であった。1550年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアペエブレスでHelen Tweedieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1609年にイギリススコットランドで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Scot(이)가 1525년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 보닝턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Scott(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Isobelle Douglas(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1550년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르 피블레스에서 Helen Tweedie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1609년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Scot nasceu em 1525, em Bonnington, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, John Scott, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isobelle Douglas, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Helen Tweedie em 1550, em Peebles, Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1609, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Scot родился в 1525 г. в местности боннингтон, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Scott было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isobelle Douglas, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen Tweedie в 1550 г. в местности пиблесь, пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1609 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Scot nació en 1525, en Bonnington, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, John Scott, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isobelle Douglas, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Helen Tweedie en 1550, en Peebles, Peeblesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1609, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 84 años.
